social.text: A los padres de la Patria, les envío mi saludo, un abrazo y un mensaje solidario por ser los guías de las nuevas generaciones. ¡Feliz Día del Padre!

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
Being a dad is my greatest joy.

Today, I’m thinking about my dad, and the father I am to my children because of him.

Happy Father’s Day.

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
President Bukele did the unthinkable: he locked up violent criminals. 

No one could have predicted what happened next…

The murder rate inexplicably went DOWN.

Western academics remain puzzled.


Nayib Bukele (@nayibbukele)

It’s a very simple concept, really.





—

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
Absolutely appalling.

No one should face violence on our streets. The suspect appears to be motivated by anti-Muslim hatred. I will not tolerate this - he will face the full force of the law.

My thoughts are with those who are injured and I thank the police and the emergency se
